shadows.name: cta-glow
shadows.purpose: Glow on primary crimson call to action.

motion.name: vbUp
motion.purpose: Slide up reveal for list cards.

motion.name: vbPop
motion.value: scale(0.4) to scale(1.12) to scale(1), 0.35s ease
motion.purpose: Pop entrance for badges and unlock alerts.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Pill-shaped main CTA button with crimson glow shadow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { width: 100%; height: 54px; border-radius: 27px; background: #BE382A; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: 'Urbanist', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; border: none; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(190,56,42,0.35); transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #93271D; transform: translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Rounded input text field with subtle cream background.
components.html: <input type="text" placeholder="Email or Full Name" class="ds-input-field" />
components.css: .ds-input-field { width: 100%; height: 52px; border-radius: 16px; border: 1.5px solid #ECE7E0; background: #F6F3EE; padding: 0 18px; font-size: 14.5px; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Urbanist', sans-serif; color: #0C0507; outline: none; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-input-field:focus { border-color: #BE382A; }

components.name: Language / Selection Card
components.description: Interactive rounded card option with indicator badge.
components.css: .ds-select-card { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; padding: 13px 16px; border-radius: 16px; border: 1.5px solid #BE382A; background: #FFF5F4; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Urbanist', sans-serif; } .ds-select-badge { width: 38px; height: 38px; border-radius: 50%; background: #F6F3EE; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; color: #7A716B; } .ds-select-text { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: #0C0507; } .ds-select-sub { font-size: 12px; color: #7A716B; font-weight: 500; } .ds-select-dot { width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid #BE382A; background: #BE382A; }

narrative.overview: VieGo is a vibrant, tactile mobile journal celebrating Vietnam's cultural treasures. Built around an interactive SVG map of Vietnam's 63/64 provinces, the interface pairs deep heritage crimson (#BE382A) with warm golden accents (#F2B72F) and soft organic surfaces (#F6F3EE).
keyCharacteristics: Crimson & Gold Anchor: Primary CTA red (#BE382A) paired with glowing heritage yellow (#F2B72F).
Organic Tactility: Softly rounded corners (16px cards, 27px full pill CTA buttons).
Mobile-First Rhythm: Compact single-handed viewport layout optimized for touch interaction.

rules.name: The Single Accent Rule
rules.body: Crimson (#BE382A) is reserved for primary actions and active states.

rules.name: The Tight Geometry Rule
rules.body: All titles and brand marks use heavy weights (700-800) with negative letter-spacing.

rules.name: The Elevated Action Rule
rules.body: Only primary crimson actions carry glowing colored shadows.

dos: Do maintain exact 27px radius for primary CTA buttons.
Do use Urbanist font family across all components with strict 800/700/600 weight hierarchy.
Do include glowing primary shadow 0 10px 24px rgba(190,56,42,0.35) on main action buttons.
donts: Don't use sharp 0px corners on interactive cards or buttons.
Don't apply primary crimson glowing shadows to non-primary buttons or containers.
Don't introduce cold blues or stark neon colors into VieGo's warm cultural palette.
